_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of enterprise-wide version control systems
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of software version control concepts and Git workflows, including branching strategies, merge and rebase operations, conflict resolution, pull request processes, and collaborative development practices.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Knowledge TF-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-003 (LS, cosine: 0.536), OP-K-003 (OP, cosine: 0.492).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.603). Shared vocabulary: [control, knowledge, version]. NICE-only terms [enterprise, systems, wide] vs WIDAI-only terms [branching, collaborative, concepts, conflict, development, git] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.923, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.062 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of enterprise-wide version control systems" and "Knowledge of software version control concepts and Git workflows, including bran" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.554 ≈ STS 0.603 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [control, knowledge, version] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [control, knowledge, version]. NICE-only: [enterprise, systems, wide]. WIDAI-only: [branching, collaborative, concepts, conflict, development, git].
